zh.lifeSummary: 當Heinrich II. von Isenburg於1218年出生在德國貝也藍德可萊斯 德根多福奧分格納斯奧時，他的父親Heinrich I Isenburg von Limburg55歲，母親Irmgard von Kleeberg und von Mörle28歲。他於1246年之前與Mechthild von Hochstaden結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1278年9月29日在德國海藍-普法爾茲維斯特瓦爾德可萊斯賀-格倫札森格倫札享年60歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Heinrich II. von Isenburg于1218年出生在德国貝也藍德可萊斯 德根多福奧分格納斯奧时，他的父亲Heinrich I Isenburg von Limburg55岁，母亲Irmgard von Kleeberg und von Mörle28岁。他于1246年之前与Mechthild von Hochstaden结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1278年9月29日在德国海藍-普法爾茲維斯特瓦爾德可萊斯賀-格倫札森格倫札享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Isenburg
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Altered form of German or Jewish   Eisenberg  .
German: habitational name from the name of a medieval castle in the southern part of Hesse, the origin of a long line of nobility from the 12th century into the 21st century.

variants.name: Eisenberg
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Hyman, Meyer, Moshe, Isadore, Akiva, Aron, Avner, Chaim, Emanuel, Isidor.
German: habitational name from any of several places so named, from Middle High German īsen ‘iron’ + berg ‘mountain, hill’.

nameMeanings.name: Heinrich
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Henry
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

nameMeanings.name: II.
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Heinrich II. von Isenburg was born in 1218, in Nassau, Offenberg, Deggendorf, Bavaria, Germany, his father, Heinrich I Isenburg von Limburg, was 55 and his mother, Irmgard von Kleeberg und von Mörle, was 28. He married Mechthild von Hochstaden before 1246. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 29 September 1278, in Grenzau, Höhr-Grenzhausen, Westerwaldkreis, Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Heinrich II. von Isenburg est né en 1218, à Nassau, Offenberg, Landkreis Deggendorf, Bayern, Allemagne, son père, Heinrich I Isenburg von Limburg, avait 55 ans et sa mère, Irmgard von Kleeberg und von Mörle, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Mechthild von Hochstaden avant 1246. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 29 septembre 1278, à Grenzau, Höhr-Grenzhausen, Westerwaldkreis, Rheinland-Pfalz, Allemagne, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Heinrich II. von Isenburg 1218 in Nassau, Offenberg, Landkreis Deggendorf, Bayern, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Heinrich I Isenburg von Limburg 55 und seine Mutter Irmgard von Kleeberg und von Mörle 28. Er hat vor 1246 Mechthild von Hochstaden geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 29. September 1278 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Grenzau, Höhr-Grenzhausen, Westerwaldkreis, Rheinland-Pfalz, Deutschland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Heinrich II. von Isenburg è nato il nel 1218 nel Nassau, Offenberg, Landkreis Deggendorf, Bayern, Germania, il suo padre, Heinrich I Isenburg von Limburg, aveva 55 anni e il suo madre, Irmgard von Kleeberg und von Mörle, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Mechthild von Hochstaden prima del 1246. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 29 settembre 1278, nel Grenzau, Höhr-Grenzhausen, Westerwaldkreis, Rheinland-Pfalz, Germania, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Heinrich II. von Isenburgが1218年にドイツバイエルンランドクレイス デグジェンドルフオフエンバーグナッサウで生まれた時，父Heinrich I Isenburg von Limburgは55歳，母Irmgard von Kleeberg und von Mörleは28歳であった。1246年以前にMechthild von Hochstadenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1278年9月29日にドイツルヘインランド-プファルズウエステルワルドクレイスhohル-グレンズハウセングレンザウで60歳で死去した。

ko.Nassau, Deggendorf, Bayern, Germany: 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 디겐도르프 펜버그 나소
ko.Limburg an der Lahn, Limburg-Weilburg, H: 독일 헤센 크레이스 림버그-위버그 림버그 앤 데르 라h
ko.lifeSummary: Heinrich II. von Isenburg(이)가 1218년 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 디겐도르프 펜버그 나소에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Heinrich I Isenburg von Limburg(은)는 55세였고, 그의 어머니 Irmgard von Kleeberg und von Mörle(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1246년 이전 Mechthild von Hochstaden(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1278년 9월 29일 독일 리인랜드-p팔즈 웨스터월드크레이스 hoh-그렌즈하우센 그렌자에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Heinrich II. von Isenburg nasceu em 1218, em Nassau, Offenberg, Landkreis Deggendorf, Bayern, Alemanha, seu pai, Heinrich I Isenburg von Limburg, tinha 55 anos e sua mãe, Irmgard von Kleeberg und von Mörle, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Mechthild von Hochstaden antes 1246. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 29 de setembro de 1278, em Grenzau, Höhr-Grenzhausen, Westerwaldkreis, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemanha, com 60 anos.

ru.Limburg an der Lahn, Limburg-Weilburg, H: лимбург ан дир лахн, крис лимбург-вилбург, Гессен, Германия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Heinrich II. von Isenburg родился в 1218 г. в местности нассау, оффенбирг, ландкрис дегендорф, беиирн, Германия, его отцу по имени Heinrich I Isenburg von Limburg было 55 лет, а матери, которую звали Irmgard von Kleeberg und von Mörle, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Mechthild von Hochstaden перед 1246 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 29 сентября 1278 г. в местности грензау, хoхр-гренжаусен, вестирвалдкрис, раинланд-пфалз, Германия в возрасте 60 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Heinrich II. von Isenburg nació en 1218, en Nassau, Offenberg, Landkreis Deggendorf, Bayern, Alemania, su papá, Heinrich I Isenburg von Limburg, tenía 55 años y su mamá, Irmgard von Kleeberg und von Mörle, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Mechthild von Hochstaden antes de 1246. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 29 de septiembre de 1278, en Grenzau, Höhr-Grenzhausen, Westerwaldkreis, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemania, a la edad de 60 años.
